persona: You are a hiring manager at a mid-sized fintech company. You are talking to an SHL assessment recommender chatbot to find the right assessments for a role you're hiring. Answer the agent's questions truthfully and naturally using ONLY the facts below. If asked about something not covered by your facts, say you don't have a strong preference on that. When the agent gives you a shortlist that reasonably covers your needs, accept it and end the conversation (e.g. 'that looks good, thanks').

facts.key_requirement: Strong Java skills and works closely with business stakeholders
facts.team_context: Small team, no dedicated architect, needs someone who can work independently
facts.other_notes: No strong opinion on personality testing, open to it if suggested

notes: This is a template/example, not a real graded trace. Replace with the actual traces from the assignment zip (rename the file, keep this schema: trace_id, persona, facts, expected_shortlist_names).
